grammar.reason: A wide range of structures is used with generally strong control.

lexical_resource.reason: Limited but minimally adequate lexical resource with noticeable awkward combinations.

cohesion_coherence.reason: Information and ideas are generally arranged coherently, though cohesion may be faulty or mechanical.

argumentation.reason: A position is expressed, but development is limited and not always clear.

academic_style.reason: Informal or conversational style is common.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: One problem of an ageing population is that government has to spent more money on health care and pensions.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: One problem of an ageing population is that government has to spent more money on health care and pensions.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Older people often need more medical help than young peoples.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Older people often need more medical help than young peoples.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: For example in contries like Japan, many old people need care , and this costs a lot of money, or for example Korea.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: For example in contries like Japan, many old people need care , and this costs a lot of money, or for example Korea.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Another issued is that the way be fewer young people working .
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Another issued is that the way be fewer young people working .

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: If too many retire, there are not enough workers to do all the jobs.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: If too many retire, there are not enough workers to do all the jobs.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: This can slow down the economy.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: This can slow down the economy.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Some companies may find it hard to find more new workers.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Some companies may find it hard to find more new workers.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: On the other hand, there are also some benefits.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: On the other hand, there are also some benefits.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Older peoples have a lot of knowledge and experience than young ones.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Older peoples have a lot of knowledge and experience than young ones.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Even they can give good advice , working part-time or doing volunteer work as it possible.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Even they can give good advice , working part-time or doing volunteer work as it possible.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: For example my grandmother is so older, but she is doing everything for home-things, for her it is easy and so excited things.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: For example my grandmother is so older, but she is doing everything for home-things, for her it is easy and so excited things.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Also, older people often help take care of their grandchildren, if parents should go to the work or some kinds of things.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Also, older people often help take care of their grandchildren, if parents should go to the work or some kinds of things.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: This make a family more stronger and friendly.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: This make a family more stronger and friendly.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: They can teach a children about culture and family traditions , which is very important nowadays.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: They can teach a children about culture and family traditions , which is very important nowadays.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: In conclusion, even though an ageing population can cause some problems, like a high costs and fewer workers, I believe that the advantages are also important.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: In conclusion, even though an ageing population can cause some problems, like a high costs and fewer workers, I believe that the advantages are also important.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: Older people still help society in many ways and situations.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: Older people still help society in many ways and situations.

sentence_df.raw_sentence_text: In many ways, if government makes good ability to older peoples, that will be the best plan to all countries.
sentence_df.normalized_sentence_text: In many ways, if government makes good ability to older peoples, that will be the best plan to all countries.

algorithm_revision.full_text_revision: One problem of an ageing population is that government has to spent more money on health care and pensions. Older people often need more medical help than young peoples. And they stop working, so they need modey from the goverment, for take care with they health. For example, in contries like Japan, many old people need care , and this costs a lot of money, or for example Korea. Another issued is that the way be fewer young people working . If too many retire, there are not enough workers to do all the jobs. This can slow down the economy. Some companies may find it hard to find more new workers. On the other hand, there are also some benefits. Older peoples have a lot of knowledge and experience than young ones. Even they can give good advice , working part-time or doing volunteer work as it possible. For example, my grandmother is so older, but she is doing everything for home-things, for her it is easy and so excited things. Also, older people often help take care of their grandchildren, if parents should go to the work or some kinds of things. This make a family more stronger and friendly. They can teach a children about culture and family traditions , which is very important nowadays. In conclusion, even though an ageing population can cause some problems, like a high costs and fewer workers, I believe that the advantages are also important. Older people still help society in many ways and situations. In many ways, if government makes good ability to older peoples, that will be the best plan to all countries.
